# terrible_community_general_hwc_network_vpc (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cidr` (String) The range of available subnets in the VPC.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) The name of vpc.

### Optional

- `state` (String) Whether the given object should exist in VPC.
- `timeouts` (String) The timeouts for each operations.

### Read-Only

- `enable_shared_snat` (Boolean) Show whether the shared SNAT is enabled.
- `id` (String) The ID of VPC.
- `routes` (String) The route information.
- `status` (String) The status of VPC.
